question: How many distinct students do I teach?

flow.normalized_question: For each teacher_id in my_offerings where teacher_id = user_id, count distinct student_id from my_enrollments where offering_id is in (select id from course_offerings where teacher_id = user_id)
flow.sql: SELECT t.name, COUNT(DISTINCT e.student_id) AS distinct_students FROM my_offerings t JOIN my_enrollments e ON t.id = e.offering_id WHERE t.teacher_id = ? GROUP BY t.name
flow.answer: I couldn't form a valid query for that after several attempts. Last issue: no such column: t.name.

update.schema_text:
- course_offerings(id, course_id, teacher_id, semester_id)
- courses(id, code, title)
- my_enrollments(id, student_id, offering_id, grade)
- my_offerings(id, course_id, teacher_id, semester_id)
- my_students(id, name, email)
- semesters(id, term, year)
- teachers(id, name, email)

update.normalized_question: For each teacher_id in my_offerings where teacher_id = user_id, count distinct student_id from my_enrollments where offering_id is in (select id from course_offerings where teacher_id = user_id)

update.sql: SELECT t.name, COUNT(DISTINCT e.student_id) AS distinct_students FROM my_offerings t JOIN my_enrollments e ON t.id = (SELECT id FROM course_offerings WHERE teacher_id = ? ) AND e.offering_id IN (SELECT id FROM course_offerings WHERE teacher_id = ?) GROUP BY t.name
